hypothesis: Enabling inductor max_autotune (which also activates weight freezing via the dormant hook in cpu_model_runner._set_global_compilation_settings, unlocking MKLDNN/CPP-GEMM templates) improves Qwen3-30B-A3B tp1 serving output throughput vs the 205.1 tok/s baseline (run dcccd8a), at the cost of significantly longer warmup compile.

inductor.command: vllm bench serve --backend vllm --model Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B --port 18192 --dataset-name random --random-input-len 128 --random-output-len 128 --num-prompts 200 --ignore-eos --temperature 0 --save-result --result-dir {rep_dir} --result-filename metrics.json

eager.command: vllm bench serve --backend vllm --model Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B --port 18192 --dataset-name random --random-input-len 128 --random-output-len 128 --num-prompts 200 --ignore-eos --temperature 0 --save-result --result-dir {rep_dir} --result-filename metrics.json
